deejay-stand-light-punch.name: Standing Light Punch
notes: Can be rapid canceled

deejay-stand-heavy-punch.name: Standing Heavy Punch
notes: Can be canceled up until the 2nd active frame
Forces the opponent into a standing position

deejay-stand-heavy-kick.name: Standing Heavy Kick
notes: 4 frames of recovery are added if the attack misses
Adds +18 of frame advantage on Punish Counter

deejay-crouch-light-punch.name: Crouching Light Punch
notes: Can be rapid canceled

deejay-crouch-heavy-punch.name: Crouching Heavy Punch
notes: Adds +12 of frame advantage on Punish Counter

deejay-crouch-light-kick.name: Crouching Light Kick
notes: Can be rapid canceled

deejay-crouch-medium-kick.name: Crouching Medium Kick
notes: Forces a Hard Knockdown on Punish Counter

deejay-crouch-heavy-kick.name: Crouching Heavy Kick
notes: Knockdown time extended when attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter

deejay-jump-medium-punch.name: Jumping Medium Punch
notes: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

deejay-jump-heavy-punch.name: Jumping Heavy Punch
notes: Forces a slam knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent

knee-shot.name: Knee Shot
notes: An attack that stays active for a long time and allows you to move first even if it is blocked

sunrise-heel.name: Sunrise Heel
notes: An axe kick with long reach that allows you to move first even if it is blocked
Forces a slam knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent

face-breaker.name: Face Breaker
notes: A multi-hit kick that can be canceled into special moves
Does 800 individual damage when the attack lands on a mid-air opponent
Forces a juggle state when the first attack lands on a mid-air opponent
Forces the opponent into a standing position

threebeat-combo-2.name: Threebeat Combo (2)
notes: A quick combination attack that hits multiple times

threebeat-combo-3.name: Threebeat Combo (3)
notes: A quick combination attack that hits multiple times

dee-jay-special-2.name: Dee Jay Special (2)
dee-jay-special-2.name_ja: ディージェイスペシャル (2段目)
notes: A series of attacks, the third of which can be canceled into Super Arts
Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

dee-jay-special-3.name: Dee Jay Special (3)
dee-jay-special-3.name_ja: ディージェイスペシャル (3段目)
notes: A series of attacks, the third of which can be canceled into Super Arts

funky-dance-2.name: Funky Dance (2)
funky-dance-2.name_ja: ファンキーダンス (2段目)
notes: A multi-hit attack that doesn't leave you wide open even if stopped partway through
Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

funky-dance-3.name: Funky Dance (3)
funky-dance-3.name_ja: ファンキーダンス (3段目)
notes: A multi-hit attack that doesn't leave you wide open even if stopped partway through

funky-dance-feint.name: Funky Dance Feint
funky-dance-feint.name_ja: ファンキーダンス・フェイク
notes: A sequence of two attacks into a feint. Useful for confusing an opponent

party-in-the-air.name: Party in the Air
party-in-the-air.name_ja: フライングパーティー
notes: A combination attack that is useful against jumping opponents
Forces a slam knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent

speedy-maracas.name: Speedy Maracas
notes: A special move that builds your Super Art Gauge for as long as the command used to perform it is held
Super Art gauge increases by 2000 on frame 22
Super Art gauge increases by 49 every frame after frame 46
Extend the move by holding down the button during its execution

air-slasher-light.name: Air Slasher (Light)
notes: Produce a forward-moving shockwave with a high-speed uppercut. Useful for checking opponents at range

air-slasher-medium.name: Air Slasher (Medium)
notes: Produce a forward-moving shockwave with a high-speed uppercut. Useful for checking opponents at range
Can be canceled into Speedy Maracas on frame 23

air-slasher-heavy.name: Air Slasher (Heavy)
notes: Produce a forward-moving shockwave with a high-speed uppercut. Useful for checking opponents at range
Can be canceled into Speedy Maracas on frames 35 - 36

air-slasher-od.name: Air Slasher (OD)
notes: Produce a forward-moving shockwave with a high-speed uppercut. Useful for checking opponents at range
Can be canceled into Speedy Maracas on frames 31

air-slasher-projectile-od.name: Air Slasher Projectile (OD)
air-slasher-projectile-od.name_ja: エアスラッシャー 射出（OD）

jackknife-maximum-light.name: Jackknife Maximum (Light)
jackknife-maximum-light.name_ja: ジャックナイフマキシマム（弱）
notes: Unleash a series of kicks while jumping diagonally upwards. Useful in combos and as an anti-air attack
Considered airborne from frames 6 - 45
Can be canceled into a normal jumping attack or a unique attack from frames 23 - 40

jackknife-maximum-medium.name: Jackknife Maximum (Medium)
jackknife-maximum-medium.name_ja: ジャックナイフマキシマム（中）
notes: Unleash a series of kicks while jumping diagonally upwards. Useful in combos and as an anti-air attack
Considered airborne from frames 4 - 44
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 5
Invincible to throws from frames 5 - 6

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 5

jackknife-maximum-heavy.name: Jackknife Maximum (Heavy)
jackknife-maximum-heavy.name_ja: ジャックナイフマキシマム（強）
notes: Unleash a series of kicks while jumping diagonally upwards. Useful in combos and as an anti-air attack
Considered airborne from frames 4 - 51
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1- 9

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1- 9

jackknife-maximum-od.name: Jackknife Maximum (OD)
jackknife-maximum-od.name_ja: ジャックナイフマキシマム（OD）
notes: Unleash a series of kicks while jumping diagonally upwards. Useful in combos and as an anti-air attack
Will only transition into the 4th and later attacks if the first three attacks hit
Completely invincible from frames 1 - 11
Considered airborne from frames 2 - 62 (on block, or if the attack misses)

roll-through-feint.name: Roll Through Feint
roll-through-feint.name_ja: フェイクロールステップ
notes: Spin forward while feinting a kicking attack. Useful for confusing opponents at close range

quick-rolling-sobat.name: Quick Rolling Sobat
quick-rolling-sobat.name_ja: クイックローリングソバット
notes: Unleash a fierce spinning kick while moving forward. When used to check an opponent while vying for position, it is most effective when the tip of the foot connects with the opponent

double-rolling-sobat.name: Double Rolling Sobat
double-rolling-sobat.name_ja: ダブルローリングソバット
notes: Unleash two fierce spinning kicks while moving forward. Its high damage makes it a potent way to finish combos

double-rolling-sobat-od.name: Double Rolling Sobat (OD)
double-rolling-sobat-od.name_ja: ダブルローリングソバット（OD）
notes: Unleash two fierce spinning kicks while moving forward. Its high damage makes it a potent way to finish combos
Can be canceled into a Level 2 or 3 Super Art or Critical Art only on the 2nd attack

machine-gun-uppercut-light.name: Machine Gun Uppercut (Light)
machine-gun-uppercut-light.name_ja: マシンガンアッパー（弱）
notes: A series of high-speed uppercuts. Slow to execute, but does massive damage if you manage to land it
Will only transition to the next attacks if the first attack hits

machine-gun-uppercut-medium.name: Machine Gun Uppercut (Medium)
machine-gun-uppercut-medium.name_ja: マシンガンアッパー（中）
notes: A series of high-speed uppercuts. Slow to execute, but does massive damage if you manage to land it
Will only transition to the next attacks if the first attack hits

machine-gun-uppercut-heavy.name: Machine Gun Uppercut (Heavy)
machine-gun-uppercut-heavy.name_ja: マシンガンアッパー（強）
notes: A series of high-speed uppercuts. Slow to execute, but does massive damage if you manage to land it
Will only transition to the next attacks if the first attack hits

machine-gun-uppercut-od.name: Machine Gun Uppercut (OD)
notes: A series of high-speed uppercuts. Slow to execute, but does massive damage if you manage to land it
Will only transition to the next attacks if the first attack hits
The final attack forces a Hard Knockdown

jus-cool.name: Jus Cool
notes: A retreating sway that can lead into kicking attacks or forward-moving maneuvers
Can transition into branching attacks from frames 13 - 24

funky-slicer.name: Funky Slicer
funky-slicer.name_ja: ファンキースライサー
notes: A low attack performed from Jus Cool that cannot be blocked standing. It is very quick, making it easy to use in combos or as a way of checking your opponent
2 frames of recovery subtracted when attack is blocked
Adds +3 frames of recovery on armor hit or if the attack misses

waning-moon.name: Waning Moon
notes: A roundhouse kick performed from Jus Cool that cannot be blocked crouching. You can continue your attack even if blocked, making it useful when worked into sequences intended to slip through an opponent's guard
Forces a slam knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent
Adds a floor bounding effect on Punish Counter

maximum-strike.name: Maximum Strike
maximum-strike.name_ja: マキシマムストライク
notes: A launching kick performed from Jus Cool. If done early it can be used as an anti-air attack, and is also effective as a combo starter

juggling-dash.name: Juggling Dash
notes: A quick forward-moving maneuver performed from Jus Cool. While in motion, you are invincible to projectiles
Invincible to projectiles from frames 1 - 20
Can transition to Juggling Sway from frames 17 - 23

jus-cool-od.name: Jus Cool (OD)
notes: A retreating sway that can lead into kicking attacks or forward-moving maneuvers
Can transition into branching attacks from frames 25 - 39
Can transition into Juggling Dash from frame 19

juggling-sway.name: Juggling Sway
notes: Allows for a hasty retreat after moving forward with a Juggling Dash. Useful as a feint to confuse opponents after making them think you're going to approach

funky-slicer-od.name: Funky Slicer (OD)
funky-slicer-od.name_ja: ファンキースライサー（OD）
notes: A low attack performed from Jus Cool that cannot be blocked standing. It is very quick, making it easy to use in combos or as a way of checking your opponent
Forces a spinning knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent

waning-moon-od.name: Waning Moon (OD)
notes: A roundhouse kick performed from Jus Cool that cannot be blocked crouching. You can continue your attack even if blocked, making it useful when worked into sequences intended to slip through an opponent's guard
Adds a floor bounding effect during a mid-air hit

maximum-strike-od.name: Maximum Strike (OD)
maximum-strike-od.name_ja: マキシマムストライク（OD）
notes: A launching kick performed from Jus Cool. If done early it can be used as an anti-air attack, and is also effective as a combo starter

juggling-dash-od.name: Juggling Dash (OD)
notes: A quick forward-moving maneuver performed from Jus Cool. While in motion, you are invincible to projectiles
Invincible to projectiles from frames 1 - 20
Can transition to Juggling Sway from frames 16 - 17

juggling-sway-od.name: Juggling Sway (OD)
notes: Allows for a hasty retreat after moving forward with a Juggling Dash. Useful as a feint to confuse opponents after making them think you're going to approach

the-greatest-sobat.name: The Greatest Sobat
the-greatest-sobat.name_ja: グレイテストソバット
notes: Remain in place and put your whole body into a single spinning kick. It executes quickly, making it useful in combos and as a counterattack
Punish Counter properties
- Produces a crumple stun if the opponent is standing on the ground
- Produces a wall bounce when hitting a mid-air opponent
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Minimum guaranteed damage is 30%

lowkey-sunrise-festival.name: Lowkey Sunrise Festival
lowkey-sunrise-festival.name_ja: サンライズフェスティバル・ライト
notes: Lunge forward and perform a sequence of attacks starting with a knee strike. All attacks after the first one must be activated by pressing buttons in the correct order
Can only go into the following attacks if the first attack hits
Can transition to the 2nd attack from frames 18 - 30
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Minimum guaranteed damage is 40%

lowkey-sunrise-festival-2.name: Lowkey Sunrise Festival (2)
lowkey-sunrise-festival-2.name_ja: サンライズフェスティバル・ライト（2段目）
notes: Lunge forward and perform a sequence of attacks starting with a knee strike. All attacks after the first one must be activated by pressing buttons in the correct order
Can transition to the 3rd attack from frames 19 - 24

notes: Lunge forward and perform a sequence of attacks starting with a knee strike. All attacks after the first one must be activated by pressing buttons in the correct order

notes: Lunge forward and perform a sequence of attacks starting with a knee strike. All attacks after the first one must be activated by pressing buttons in the correct order

marvelous-sunrise-festival.name: Marvelous Sunrise Festival
marvelous-sunrise-festival.name_ja: サンライズフェスティバル・マーベラス
notes: Lunge forward and perform a sequence of attacks starting with a knee strike. All attacks after the first one must be activated by pressing buttons in the correct order
Can only go into the following attacks if the first attack hits
Can transition to the 2nd attack from frames 12 - 17
If the 2nd attack is input between frames 2 - 11, or 18 - 30, it will fail to come out
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Minimum guaranteed damage is 40%

notes: Lunge forward and perform a sequence of attacks starting with a knee strike. All attacks after the first one must be activated by pressing buttons in the correct order

climactic-strike-marvelous.name: Climactic Strike (Marvelous)
climactic-strike-marvelous.name_ja: クライマックスブロー (マーベラス)
notes: After Marvelous Sunrise Festival connects
Launch an opponent into the air with an uppercut and smack them in the face as they come back down. Switches positions with your opponent upon completion

climactic-strike-headliner.name: Climactic Strike (Headliner)
climactic-strike-headliner.name_ja: クライマックスブロー (ヘッドライナー)
notes: After Headliner Sunrise Festival connects
Launch an opponent into the air with an uppercut and smack them in the face as they come back down. Switches positions with your opponent upon completion

encore-beat-marvelous.name: Encore Beat (Marvelous)
encore-beat-marvelous.name_ja: アンコールビート (マーベラス)
notes: After Marvelous Sunrise Festival connects
Plant both arms on the ground and kick upwards with both legs. Most effective when used with your opponent in the corner

encore-beat-headliner.name: Encore Beat (Headliner)
encore-beat-headliner.name_ja: アンコールビート (ヘッドライナー)
notes: After Headliner Sunrise Festival connects
Plant both arms on the ground and kick upwards with both legs. Most effective when used with your opponent in the corner

failed-sunrise-festival-2.name: Failed Sunrise Festival (2)
failed-sunrise-festival-2.name_ja: サンライズフェスティバル失敗版（2段目）
notes: Failed version
Lunge forward and perform a sequence of attacks starting with a knee strike. All attacks after the first one must be activated by pressing buttons in the correct order
Can transition to the 3rd attack from frames 19 - 24

failed-sunrise-festival-7.name: Failed Sunrise Festival (7)
failed-sunrise-festival-7.name_ja: サンライズフェスティバル失敗版（7段目）
notes: Lunge forward and perform a sequence of attacks starting with a knee strike. All attacks after the first one must be activated by pressing buttons in the correct order

weekend-pleasure.name: Weekend Pleasure
notes: When under 25% vitality

Launch an opponent into the air with an uppercut and then unleash a powerful high-speed barrage of fists upon them as they come back down. Extremely versatile, this move is useful both in combos and as an anti-air attack
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%
Can only be canceled into from special moves

weekend-pleasure-ca.name: Weekend Pleasure (Critical Art)
notes: Launch an opponent into the air with an uppercut and then unleash a powerful high-speed barrage of fists upon them as they come back down. Extremely versatile, this move is useful both in combos and as an anti-air attack
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%
Can only be canceled into from special moves

diss-track.name: Diss Track
diss-track.name_ja: スタンプ・ザ・ビート
notes: When near opponent
Disrupt your opponent's balance, hop on their knee, and kick off of their face. Throws your opponent without switching places with them
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown

flip-throw.name: Flip Throw
notes: When near opponent
Latch onto your opponent, place both feet on their torso, and toss them behind you while falling backward. Throws your opponent while switching places with them
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown
